# spinnaker_tools.mk c

# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -o build/gnu/src/synapse_manager.o src/synapse_manager.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -o build/gnu/src/state_manager.o src/state_manager.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -o build/gnu/src/host_interface.o src/host_interface.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src -o build/gnu/src/router.o src/router.c
mkdir -p build/gnu/
/home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkbuild coral_reef > build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c
arm-none-eabi-gcc -c -mthumb-interwork -march=armv5te -std=gnu99 -ffreestanding -I /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/include -g -I src   -c -o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c
# spinnaker_tools.mk elf
arm-none-eabi-gcc -T/home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/tools/sark.lnk -Wl,-e,cpu_reset -Wl,-static -ffreestanding -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--use-blx -nostartfiles -static -L /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/lib build/gnu/src/main.o build/gnu/src/neuron_manager.o build/gnu/src/synapse_manager.o build/gnu/src/state_manager.o build/gnu/src/host_interface.o build/gnu/src/router.o build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o  /home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/lib/libspin1_api.a -o build/gnu/coral_reef.elf
arm-none-eabi-objdump -dxt > build/gnu/coral_reef.txt build/gnu/coral_reef.elf
arm-none-eabi-objcopy -O binary -j RO_DATA -j EX_DATA build/gnu/coral_reef.elf build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
arm-none-eabi-objcopy -O binary -j RW_DATA build/gnu/coral_reef.elf build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin
ls -l build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
-rwxr-xr-x 1 jovyan users 22136 Apr 30 23:59 build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin
/home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkbin build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin > build/gnu/coral_reef.bin
rm -f build/gnu/RO_DATA.bin build/gnu/RW_DATA.bin
arm-none-eabi-nm build/gnu/coral_reef.elf > build/gnu/coral_reef.nm
mkdir -p build/
/home/jovyan/spinnaker/spinnaker_tools/tools/mkaplx build/gnu/coral_reef.nm | cat - build/gnu/coral_reef.bin > build/coral_reef.aplx
rm build/gnu/coral_reef.bin build/gnu/coral_reef.nm build/gnu/coral_reef_build.c build/gnu/coral_reef_build.o
